topic.what: Telemetry-driven behavioral anomaly detection firewall using parameterized DFA (pDFA) to enforce benign tool-call trajectories at runtime
topic.how: Compiles verified benign tool-call traces into parameterized DFA encoding permitted sequences and parameter bounds; runtime gateway performs O(1) constant-time state-transition lookup
topic.why_matters: Existing stateless pre-execution firewalls evaluate tool calls in isolation and are vulnerable to context-sequential injection attacks wherein individually benign calls achieve malicious objectives through legitimate-looking sequences

characteristics.what_it_measures: Macro-averaged attack success rate across five Agent Security Bench scenarios
characteristics.evidence: Table 3 macro-average across Customer Service, OS Automation, DB Admin, Travel Planner, Research Agent
characteristics.context: Five scenarios total, includes high-entropy unstructured agents

characteristics.what_it_measures: ASR restricted to three structured workflow scenarios
characteristics.evidence: Customer Service, OS Automation, DB Admin structured scenarios
characteristics.context: Primary structured workflow evaluation vs Aegis baseline

characteristics.what_it_measures: ASR specifically on multi-step and context-sequential attacks in structured settings
characteristics.evidence: Direct evaluation on context-sequential attack family

characteristics.what_it_measures: ASR under Gray-Box adversary with 90% corpus knowledge
characteristics.context: Near-total benign observation insufficient for exploit

characteristics.what_it_measures: ASR under adaptive oracle adversary with Q=100 queries
characteristics.evidence: Active Oracle Adversary experiment with 1000 targets
characteristics.context: Structural recovery 88% but parameter guards prevent exploitation

characteristics.what_it_measures: Benign task failure rate on held-out ToolBench traces

characteristics.context: O(1) lookup property confirmed flat across scales

characteristics.what_it_measures: Evasion rate under TextFooler synonym-substitution attacks
characteristics.context: Primary residual vulnerability; semantics-preserving synonyms evade continuous bounds

characteristics.what_it_measures: Evasion rate with Sensitive-Parameter Whitelist Override enabled
characteristics.context: Operational patch requiring manual lexicon maintenance
